Scripting & Automation - Develop automation scripts using Python, PowerShell, and Bash/Shell scripting. - Automate repetitive operational and deployment tasks. - Create scripts for database maintenance, health checks, and deployments.

Location: C 24, -2 Floor, Thejaswini, Technopark Campus, Trivandrum, Kerala. 695581 Website: www.enfintechnologies.com Job Title: Digital Marketing Executive Experience Required: 2–5 years Closing Date: 13, July 2026 Published Date: 07, July 2026 Contact Email: hr@enfintechnologies.com

Brief Description

We are seeking a results-oriented Digital Marketing Executive with 2–5 years of experience to plan, execute, and optimize digital marketing campaigns across paid, organic, and social channels. The ideal candidate will have expertise in SEO, Google Ads, META Ads, LinkedIn Campaigns, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), along with a solid understanding of Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and landing page performance. Collaboration with Content, Sales, and Design teams is essential to drive brand awareness, lead generation, and measurable business growth.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and execute SEO and GEO strategies to improve organic visibility across search engines and generative AI platforms.
  • Plan, manage, and optimize paid advertising campaigns (Google Ads, META, LinkedIn) to drive lead generation and brand awareness.
  • Conduct keyword research, intent analysis, and competitor research using tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush.
  • Implement on-page, off-page, technical SEO, and GEO best practices, including content structuring for AI-driven search results.
  • Analyze and optimize landing pages and conversion funnels to improve conversion rates.
  • Coordinate with the Content team to create SEO- and GEO-optimized blogs, web pages, and ad copies.
  • Collaborate with the Design team to develop engaging, conversion-focused creatives for ads and social media.
  • Align marketing campaigns with Sales team objectives for lead quality and conversion goals.
  • Manage and grow social media channels (content planning, publishing, engagement, performance tracking).
  • Track, analyze, and report campaign performance using Google Analytics (GA4) and advertising platform insights.
  • Continuously optimize campaigns to improve ROI, CPL, and overall performance.
  • Stay updated on AI search trends, GEO best practices, and digital marketing tools.

Preferred Skills

  • 2–5 years of hands-on experience in Digital Marketing.
  • Strong expertise in SEO, GEO, Google Ads, META Ads, LinkedIn Ads.
  • Mandatory understanding of CRO and landing page performance.
  • Experience with Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar SEO tools.
  • Proficiency in Google Analytics (GA4) and performance reporting.
  • Experience in social media management and paid social campaigns.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  • Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams.
  • B2B marketing experience.

Application Process

Interested candidates should email their resume to hr@enfintechnologies.com with the subject line: Digital Marketing Executive (mention your relevant exp in DME).
summary: A Digital Marketing Executive with 2-5 years of experience is needed to manage SEO, paid ads, and CRO. The role focuses on driving brand awareness, lead generation, and campaign optimization through cross-functional collaboration.
